title: Get Weather
description: Get compact current and daily weather for the user's configured weather location. Optional dates use YYYY-MM-DD and are resolved in the matched location timezone.

start_date.description: Optional start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Leave blank for current conditions and a short forecast. Explicit ranges are limited to 7 days.

end_date.description: Optional end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to start_date when start_date is set.

selection.summary: Retrieve compact current and daily weather for the configured user location, with optional date range.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the task asks for current weather, forecasts, or weather conditions for a date at the user's configured location.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for weather at arbitrary locations unless the user first updates the configured weather location setting.
